title: Bicornella graminea
intro: Bicornella graminea, also known as Bicornella, is a type of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae, characterized by its climbing habit and small, fragrant flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Bicornella graminea include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. In traditional medicine, Bicornella is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into herbal syrups and tinctures.
